homepage.description.message: aMule is a free, all-platform eMule-compatible eD2k/Kad client for Windows, macOS, and Linux.

homepage.features.bandwidthControl.desc.message: Set hard upload and download speed limits, enforced by precise token-bucket limiters. Cap aMule so it never saturates your connection — or let it run full-throttle when you're away.
homepage.features.bandwidthControl.desc.description: Body of the 'Bandwidth Control' feature card

homepage.features.bandwidthControl.title.description: Title of the 'Bandwidth Control' feature card

homepage.features.categories.desc.message: Organize downloads into categories with custom save paths and priorities. Apply rules per category to keep your library tidy automatically.
homepage.features.categories.desc.description: Body of the 'Download Categories' feature card

homepage.features.categories.title.description: Title of the 'Download Categories' feature card

homepage.features.compressedTransfers.de.message: File data and server communication are compressed with zlib, reducing bandwidth usage for compressible files and lowering the load on eD2k servers.
homepage.features.compressedTransfers.de.description: Body of the 'Compressed Transfers' feature card

homepage.features.compressedTransfers.ti.description: Title of the 'Compressed Transfers' feature card

homepage.features.corruptionHandling.des.message: The Intelligent Corruption Handler (ICH) and AICH automatically detect and repair corrupted download chunks, ensuring complete, intact files without restarting.
homepage.features.corruptionHandling.des.description: Body of the 'Corruption Handling' feature card

homepage.features.corruptionHandling.tit.description: Title of the 'Corruption Handling' feature card

homepage.features.creditSystem.desc.message: A built-in credit and scoring system rewards users who actively upload. The more you share, the higher your score — resulting in faster downloads.
homepage.features.creditSystem.desc.description: Body of the 'Credit System' feature card

homepage.features.creditSystem.title.description: Title of the 'Credit System' feature card

homepage.features.daemon.desc.message: Run aMule as a lightweight headless process (amuled) on servers, NAS devices, or VPS instances — no graphical display required.
homepage.features.daemon.desc.description: Body of the 'aMule Daemon' feature card

homepage.features.daemon.title.description: Title of the 'aMule Daemon' feature card

homepage.features.docsLink.description: Link to the documentation below the feature grid on the homepage

homepage.features.ed2kLinks.desc.message: Click ed2k:// links in your browser to start downloads instantly in aMule. The link handler integrates with your desktop for a seamless one-click experience.
homepage.features.ed2kLinks.desc.description: Body of the 'ed2k:// Link Integration' feature card

homepage.features.ed2kLinks.title.description: Title of the 'ed2k:// Link Integration' feature card

homepage.features.emuleCompatible.desc.message: Fully wire-compatible with eMule and all *Mule clients. Share files with the same sources, connect to the same servers, and open standard ed2k:// links.
homepage.features.emuleCompatible.desc.description: Body of the 'eMule Compatible' feature card

homepage.features.emuleCompatible.title.description: Title of the 'eMule Compatible' feature card

homepage.features.folderRescan.desc.message: aMule watches your shared and Incoming folders and picks up new, changed, or removed files automatically — no manual reload needed when your library changes.
homepage.features.folderRescan.desc.description: Body of the 'Automatic Folder Rescan' feature card

homepage.features.folderRescan.title.description: Title of the 'Automatic Folder Rescan' feature card

homepage.features.ipFiltering.desc.message: Block unwanted IP addresses using standard IP filter lists. Keep aggressive, malicious, or spy peers from connecting to your client.
homepage.features.ipFiltering.desc.description: Body of the 'IP Filtering' feature card

homepage.features.ipFiltering.title.description: Title of the 'IP Filtering' feature card

homepage.features.languages.desc.message: The full aMule interface is translated into 37 languages. Download and share files in your native language — the UI adapts automatically to your locale.
homepage.features.languages.desc.description: Body of the '37 Interface Languages' feature card

homepage.features.languages.title.description: Title of the '37 Interface Languages' feature card

homepage.features.messaging.desc.message: Exchange messages directly with other aMule users and maintain a friends list to stay connected with your regular sharing partners.
homepage.features.messaging.desc.description: Body of the 'Messaging & Friends' feature card

homepage.features.messaging.title.description: Title of the 'Messaging & Friends' feature card

homepage.features.nativePackages.desc.message: Installer and portable .zip for Windows, Universal2 .dmg for macOS, AppImage and Flatpak on Linux. Available for both x64 and ARM64.
homepage.features.nativePackages.desc.description: Body of the 'Native Packages' feature card

homepage.features.nativePackages.title.description: Title of the 'Native Packages' feature card

homepage.features.networks.desc.message: Connect to both the traditional eD2k server network and the serverless Kademlia DHT simultaneously, maximizing your reach and file availability.
homepage.features.networks.desc.description: Body of the 'eD2k + Kademlia' feature card

homepage.features.networks.title.description: Title of the 'eD2k + Kademlia' feature card

homepage.features.openSource.desc.message: GPL-2.0 licensed with no telemetry, no advertisements, and no vendor lock-in. Your data is yours — inspect and contribute to the source code.
homepage.features.openSource.desc.description: Body of the 'Free & Open Source' feature card

homepage.features.openSource.title.description: Title of the 'Free & Open Source' feature card

homepage.features.powerShare.desc.message: Give your own released files top priority in the upload queue so they spread across the network as fast as possible — ideal for sharing new content. In eMule this feature is known as PowerShare.
homepage.features.powerShare.desc.description: Body of the 'Release Priority' feature card (PowerShare in eMule)

homepage.features.powerShare.title.description: Title of the 'Release Priority' feature card (PowerShare in eMule)

homepage.features.preview.desc.message: Play videos and audio files before a download finishes. Compatible with MPlayer, VLC, and other media players.
homepage.features.preview.desc.description: Body of the 'Preview Before Complete' feature card

homepage.features.preview.title.description: Title of the 'Preview Before Complete' feature card

homepage.features.proxy.desc.message: Route connections through SOCKS4, SOCKS5, or HTTP proxies for privacy or to work around network restrictions.
homepage.features.proxy.desc.description: Body of the 'Proxy Support' feature card

homepage.features.proxy.title.description: Title of the 'Proxy Support' feature card

homepage.features.remoteInterfaces.desc.message: Control aMule from anywhere: a native remote GUI (amulegui), a browser-based web interface (amuleweb), or a command-line tool (amulecmd).
homepage.features.remoteInterfaces.desc.description: Body of the 'Remote Interfaces' feature card

homepage.features.remoteInterfaces.title.description: Title of the 'Remote Interfaces' feature card

homepage.features.search.desc.message: Search across eD2k servers (local and global) and Kademlia nodes. Filter by type, size, and availability. Boolean operators (AND, OR, NOT) supported.
homepage.features.search.desc.description: Body of the 'Powerful Search' feature card

homepage.features.search.title.description: Title of the 'Powerful Search' feature card

homepage.features.secureIdentification.d.message: Cryptographic secure user identification prevents your client hash from being stolen or spoofed by other peers on the network.
homepage.features.secureIdentification.d.description: Body of the 'Secure Identification' feature card

homepage.features.secureIdentification.t.description: Title of the 'Secure Identification' feature card

homepage.features.slotAllocation.desc.message: Control exactly how many clients you upload to at once and set per-slot bandwidth targets, giving you fine-grained control over your upload capacity.
homepage.features.slotAllocation.desc.description: Body of the 'Slot Allocation' feature card

homepage.features.slotAllocation.title.description: Title of the 'Slot Allocation' feature card

homepage.features.sourceExchange.desc.message: Automatically exchange source lists with connected peers to discover more sources for your downloads without querying the server repeatedly.
homepage.features.sourceExchange.desc.description: Body of the 'Source Exchange' feature card

homepage.features.sourceExchange.title.description: Title of the 'Source Exchange' feature card

homepage.features.systemTray.desc.message: Minimize aMule to the system tray and let it run quietly in the background. Works across Windows, macOS, and all major Linux desktops.
homepage.features.systemTray.desc.description: Body of the 'System Tray' feature card

homepage.features.systemTray.title.description: Title of the 'System Tray' feature card

homepage.features.title.description: Heading of the Features section on the homepage

homepage.hero.cta.quickstart.description: Label for the Quick Start call-to-action button in the homepage hero

homepage.hero.screenshot.alt.description: Alt text for the downloads-tab screenshot on the homepage

homepage.highlights.bandwidth.detail.message: Upload and download throttlers rewritten as proper token-bucket limiters. {code} means literal unlimited.
homepage.highlights.bandwidth.detail.description: Body text of the Bandwidth card in the 'What's new in 3.0.0' section; {code} is the MaxUpload=0 setting in monospace

homepage.highlights.bandwidth.label.description: Title of the Bandwidth card in the 'What's new in 3.0.0' section

homepage.highlights.bandwidth.tag.description: Category badge of the Bandwidth card in the 'What's new in 3.0.0' section

homepage.highlights.buildSystem.detail.message: Autotools removed entirely. Single CMake build, minimum CMake 3.10, minimum wxWidgets 3.2.0.
homepage.highlights.buildSystem.detail.description: Body text of the build-system card in the 'What's new in 3.0.0' section

homepage.highlights.buildSystem.label.description: Title of the build-system card in the 'What's new in 3.0.0' section

homepage.highlights.buildSystem.tag.description: Category badge of the build-system card in the 'What's new in 3.0.0' section

homepage.highlights.changelog.description: Link to the full 3.0.0 changelog in the release-highlights section

homepage.highlights.packages.detail.message: Windows installer and portable .zip, macOS Universal2 .dmg, AppImage, Flatpak — x64 and ARM64 where supported.
homepage.highlights.packages.detail.description: Body text of the Packages card in the 'What's new in 3.0.0' section

homepage.highlights.packages.label.description: Title of the Packages card in the 'What's new in 3.0.0' section

homepage.highlights.packages.tag.description: Category badge of the Packages card in the 'What's new in 3.0.0' section

homepage.highlights.performance.detail.message: Disk I/O moved off the main thread and the network layer overhauled. Peer-to-peer downloads see ~100–380× speedups over 2.3.3 across macOS, Linux, and Windows.
homepage.highlights.performance.detail.description: Body text of the Performance card in the 'What's new in 3.0.0' section

homepage.highlights.performance.label.description: Title of the Performance card in the 'What's new in 3.0.0' section

homepage.highlights.performance.tag.description: Category badge of the Performance card in the 'What's new in 3.0.0' section

homepage.highlights.title.description: Heading of the release-highlights section on the homepage

homepage.screenshots.downloads.caption.message: Downloads — per-file progress with availability bars

homepage.tagline.description: Tagline shown under the aMule title in the homepage hero

homepage.whatisamule.p1.message: aMule is a free, GPL-licensed peer-to-peer file-sharing client for the {ed2k} and {kad} networks. It's compatible with eMule and runs natively on Windows, macOS, and Linux. The same on-disk state, the same protocol, one binary per major desktop.
homepage.whatisamule.p1.description: First paragraph of the 'What is aMule?' homepage section; {ed2k} and {kad} are network names rendered in bold

homepage.whatisamule.p2.message: After years of quiet, the project is back under active maintenance. The 3.0.0 release brings dramatic throughput improvements, a modernized build system, fresh native packages for every major desktop, and an updated codebase ready for current systems — without breaking the protocol compatibility that lets aMule work alongside any eMule-based client.
homepage.whatisamule.p2.description: Intro paragraph above the release-highlights cards on the homepage

homepage.whatisamule.title.description: Heading of the 'What is aMule?' section on the homepage
